steps.title: Set up part counts
steps.content:
The machine makes:
  • $4n$ eight-inch parts, because that is 4 times the number of 9-inch parts.
  • $n$ nine-inch parts.
  • $30$ three-inch parts.
The total number of parts is $100$, so $$4n+n+30=100.$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
$4n + n = 5n$:
$$5n + 30 = 100$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
